Risk_Description: Personal student information may be accessed by unauthorized users
Mitigation_Action: Implement role-based access control and restrict access to authorized users only

Risk_Description: Users may misunderstand how their information is used
Mitigation_Action: Provide clear privacy notices and obtain user consent before collecting data

Risk_Description: Third-party assets may be used without proper attribution
Mitigation_Action: Record all third-party assets and provide proper attribution or use royalty-free resources

Risk_Description: Unauthorized users may attempt to access lecturer-only functions
Mitigation_Action: Enforce role-based authentication and authorization for lecturer features

Risk_Description: Personal data may be stored longer than necessary
Mitigation_Action: Store only necessary academic information and remove unnecessary personal data

Risk_Description: Users may enter incomplete or incorrect assignment information
Mitigation_Action: Validate required fields and provide clear input validation messages before submission
